response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:29: Identified vocal song 'HIT ME UP' featuring performers Hakos Baelz, Mori Calliope, and IRyS. 2. Performed a search for 'HIT ME UP lyrics' to confirm artist details and obtain lyrics. 3. Confirmed song is 'HIT ME UP' by KIRA and monii. 4. Obtained official lyrics from Vocaloid Lyrics Wiki. 5. Defined scene breakdown based on performance and MC talk segment.
response.global_summary: A 3D live performance featuring Hakos Baelz, Mori Calliope, and IRyS performing the song 'HIT ME UP', followed by an MC segment.

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz, Mori Calliope, and IRyS perform the song 'HIT ME UP' with a full 3D choreographed routine.

Huh
Come chase me (K-I-R-A)
Everyday I

On the way yah

Now they say I

Boy take a hint

But it's fun to see you try
(So hit me up!)
Off the map I'mma take it, all my energy
(So hit me up!)
Speedin' up fast
Ready, target locked
(So hit me up!)
Hit the dash, I'm upgraded and you want a piece
(So hit me up!)

I never stop
In a new territory
I'm on the edge of glory
(Boy just watch how I move)
Gimme that rush
Got no regrets in my mind
Boy, it's on you this time
So hit me up
Outta luck, volume up
You got a crush?
Such a cliché, your bad boy charms

Wasn't enough, you needed more
Now you're begging to let you score

I'mma be busy tonight
Goodbye, goodbye
Gotta leave you dry
Always try'na play it cool
